race.name: L'Etape Slovakia by Tour de France
race.display_name: L'Гүtape Slovakia by Tour de France
race.tagline: Official Tour de France amateur cycling event in Slovakia

vitals.entry_fee: Early-bird pricing available; exact cost not specified

terrain.overview: Urban roads through Bratislava center, peripheral historical areas, picturesque villages in MalГ© Karpaty foothills, Pezinok vineyards, Carpathian Forest Park peaks

logistics.explanation: Professional organization with high-level security, timing, and L'Etape Series infrastructure

length.explanation: 112km long route offers solid challenge; 60km option more accessible

technicality.explanation: Mixed terrain with urban, village, and mountain sections requires versatile handling

elevation.explanation: 1700m gain on long route provides significant climbing challenge

climate.explanation: Late August in Slovakia typically favorable; specific data unavailable

altitude.explanation: Lowland/mountain foothills; no high altitude challenges

adventure.explanation: Touristic route through vineyards, historical sites, and Carpathian forests

prestige.explanation: Official Tour de France L'Etape Series franchise event

race_quality.explanation: Professional timing, hill/sprint awards, Velits brothers as ambassadors

experience.explanation: L'Etape Village festival, Tour de France museum, French culture immersion

community.explanation: Race week with social rides, kids races, family events, workshops

field_depth.explanation: Amateur focus; field size unspecified but Tour de France branding attracts quality

value.explanation: Premium experience at early-bird pricing; full race week program

expenses.explanation: Major European city location; costs reasonable for event quality

cultural_impact.explanation: Brings Tour de France prestige to Slovakia with local heroes Peter & Martin Velits

biased_opinion.overview: L'Etape Slovakia delivers authentic Tour de France atmosphere in stunning Carpathian setting. The 112km/1700m Race route through Bratislava's vineyards and forests offers genuine gran fondo challenge with professional polish. Velits brothers' involvement adds local prestige. Must-do for Central European cyclists seeking L'Etape Series qualifier experience.

logistics.overview: Start: Е trkovec Lake. Finish: KamzГӯk. Professional organization with high-level security, timing systems, expo village. Registration open. Family Day August 22 with kids races and shorter rides.

history.overview: 6th edition in 2026 (started ~2021). Part of global L'Etape Series (founded 1993, 21 countries). Slovak ambassadors: Peter Velits (6x Tour de France) and Martin Velits (1x Tour de France).

course_description.character: Urban start through Bratislava center, historical peripheral areas, MalГ© Karpaty foothill villages, **Suffering Zone: Pezinok vineyard climbs**, Carpathian Forest Park peaks to iconic KamzГӯk finish. **Suffering Zones:** Vineyard rollers (technical descents), final Carpathian peak grind to KamzГӯk.

non_negotiables: Official Tour de France L'Etape Series event

youtube_data.search_query: L'Etape Slovakia by Tour de France gran fondo cycling Bratislava

videos.title: Highlights | рҹҮёрҹҮ° L'Etape Slovakia by Tour de France | 2024 рҹҡІ
videos.channel: L'Etape Series by Tour de France
videos.description:
рҹҮёрҹҮ°рҹ«¶ What a weekend and an incredible winner!
вҳҖпёҸ Perfect weather and temperature.
рҹҡҙвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹҡҙвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ Fantastic people, from participants to volunteers and organizers.

Everything was flawless in Bratislava, Slovakia!

ДҺakujem vЕЎetkГҪm! 

---------

L'Etape by Tour de France is a series of amateur cycling events designed to experience the Tour de France Legend. It is the only event where you can race and feel like a Tour de France champion, and where you can enjoy the Tour de France unique atmosphere and passion.

вҖңThe Tour de France is the world's greatest cycling race. Each year it is passionately followed by fans around the world so it has naturally given rise to L'Etape by Tour de France seriesвҖқ, says Christian Prudhomme, Tour de France director. 

The series has now expanded to more than 22 international locations including:
рҹҮ«рҹҮ· France
рҹҮ§рҹҮ· Brasil
рҹҮІрҹҮҪ MГ©xico
рҹҮЁрҹҮҙ Colombia
рҹҮЁрҹҮі China
рҹҮҰрҹҮә Australia
рҹҮ№рҹҮӯ Thailand
рҹҮЁрҹҮӯ Switzerland
рҹҮ®рҹҮ© Indonesia
рҹҮӘрҹҮё Spain
рҹҮІрҹҮҫ Malaysia
рҹҮёрҹҮ° Slovakia
рҹҮЁрҹҮҝ Czech Republic
рҹҮ¬рҹҮ§ UK
рҹҮЁрҹҮҰ Canada
рҹҮәрҹҮё USA
рҹҮірҹҮұ Netherlands
рҹҮЁрҹҮҫ Cyprus
рҹҮёрҹҮ® Slovenia
рҹҮӘрҹҮЁ Ecuador
рҹҮӘрҹҮ¬ Egypt
рҹҮ№рҹҮ· TГјrkiye
рҹҮЁрҹҮ· Costa Rica
рҹҮөрҹҮ№ Portugal
рҹҮӘрҹҮё Spain 

Among these Tour de France official cycling events is of course L'Гүtape du Tour. With a peloton of 15 000 riders and 50 nationalities, it is Europe's biggest cycling event. Riding on the same routes and under the same conditions as Tour de France champions: this is the promise that L'Гүtape du Tour has kept since 1993.

Check out https://www.letapebytourdefrance.com/ for more information.

Join us on:
-Facebook рҹ‘ү https://www.facebook.com/letapebytourdefrance
-Instagram рҹ‘ү https://www.instagram.com/letapebytourdefrance/
-Strava рҹ‘ү https://www.strava.com/clubs/letapebyletourdefrance

videos.title: L'Etape Slovakia 2021 - HIGHLIGHTS | L'Etape by Tour de France
videos.channel: L'Etape Series by Tour de France
videos.description:
"In Slovakia, L'Etape set up a new level of how a road cycling race should look like. The organization was fantastic the whole team of L'Etape did a huge job and excellence.
The emotion before, during, and after the race was brilliant. Lots of great people who share the same hobby supported each other and create a feeling of a big cycling family.
For myself, I can say this was the best road cycling race that I attended. I'm looking forward to the next year, and definitely, I will visit this race series in other countries also!"
- Marek Korstna, L'Etape Social Rider

---------

videos.title: Highlights | L'Etape Slovakia by Tour de France 2023 рҹӨ©
videos.channel: L'Etape Series by Tour de France
videos.description:
LвҖҷEtape Slovakia is run under full Tour de France professional conditions and with world-class mechanical support. LвҖҷEtape Slovakia is a competitive event for amateur riders, while also providing a safe and enjoyable traffic-free riding environment for others who would like to discover Slovakian routes and complete the magical course.

The Municipality of Brastislava is the host city with Village and start near Е trkovec lake and finish in Kamzik.

рҹ‘үhttps://https://slovakia.letapebytourdefrance.com/
